reviews.review_description:
I love escape room and puzzles games, so I tried this demo. Not that long…
I liked the environment. Graphics are great. 

Had no issues with handtracking. But I couldn’t put them away in the beginning.

Ok so I never leave this low of stars so this is a first. couldnt do anything first off the hand tracking says supports it but then again never said not controller support so tried them caus my hand tracking, which isn’t the devs fault here and mor metas really, just isn’t that greatest to add use of the controls if possible. And took a chance also on teleportation caus some lately r turning out to b fairly decent but hope for smooth loco to b added and or fixed where u r facingwhat u r supposed to b looking at when u do at least. when teleported doesnt ever face in right direction and basically u hav keep recentering and that definatly annoying already ready after the very first teleportation spot🥴So not giving up yet guys and it’s a work in progress i see. So coming bk after demo mayb updated and wil b mor then happy to gv mor or even all stars. Looks fun and not enough puzzle games on here, or not for me anyway,  caus I’m a huge fan of this genre.  Will b bk to checking to see if recenter fixed, 
controllers can b added and locomotion smooth is fix also added. I hope something win b done fast caus want mor like these and shows devs care and that is what every dev should always want to make their game eventually flawless and players supporting for future games. I will edit this and stars when I do see something added from these three things and or fixed andcan’t wait see it get better good luck guys😉🤞🏼
